review_text: J'avais pris 2 nuits dans ce camping en décembre 2025. J'avais réservé un emplacement pour voiture avec roof tente, je trouve que c'est emplacement sont un peu les uns sur les autres. Mise à part ça c'est bien, j'avait même un peu d'ombre et accès à l'eau. Tout les lieux communs sanitaires, cuisine et autre étaient très propre et bien tenue.
Very nice spot, one of our favorites, friendly family park

We booked two luxe pods during the recent holidays and were so impressed with the position of them overlooking the sea, watching the sunrises and sunsets was a delight from the deck!. Upon entry the pods were spotlessly clean, luxe feel and superbly appointed & equipped including dishwasher and fantastic provisions of coffee, tea & hot chocolate! Beds comfortable and loved the shower! Park staff were always friendly and helpful. Park was gorgeous easy to navigate & very well maintained! The General Store just up the road provides wonderful breakfast, lunch & dinner options and the Tavern on the hill has amazing ocean views, vibe & food which is walking distance. We also booked a fishing charter with Kevin at Reel Screamer Fishing Charters that departs right from the boat ramp at the park so you can just walk down to meet him another incredible experience! What more could you want, highly recommend & we will be back!!! 👏👏👏👏👏
Lovely cabin over looking the ocean for our 2 nights stay.Friendly staff member on arrival and the grounds were well maintained. Would definitely stay again.
Out of all the options on the area this one definitely stands out, great spot, good amenities and easy access.
Beautiful spot picturesque.

We stayed in the 2 Bedroom Luxe Cabin.
It is well maintained and the Coffee Machine with Pods supplied was an UNEXPECTED BONUS.
The Co Manager, Dani, was an absolute delight. Nothing was too much trouble for her.
I HIGHLY RECOMMEND this Park.
Beautiful spot Both Dani and Mal are so accommodating, stayed at WF7 for 10 days awesome views from the site would highly recommend
Die Standplätze riechen unangenehm.

Great stay at the caravan park. Facilities excellent, clean and well care for.

A great few days

Possibly the best caravan park in SA,  great staff the manager is great, and the ocean views are amazing,  recommend this place if your looking  for a place to getaway,  turton tavern right next door and is great

We stayed in a deluxe cabin for three nights and loved the whole experience. Definitely the cleanest cabin we’ve ever stayed in, we were super impressed with the efforts made by the owners/housekeeping team to ensure cleanliness and comfort. Excellent amenities, we were happy cooking with everything provided in the cabin, and the views from the cabin were incredible. Would absolutely love to come back.
Had a great time away. Fantastic park. Lots of room for vans and tents. We will be back for sure.
Great welcoming staff and excellent location to travel around lower YP.

Point Turton Caravan Park is a beautiful coastal caravan park that's positioned to avoid the worst of the weather that passes. Makes a great base camp for boating, fishing and kayaking thanks to the jetty being so close. The grounds are beautifully presented and the amenities are kept clean. All sorts of accommodation options available. Pet friendly 🤙

Video of the content on our socials

What a magnificent place to stay!
Well maintained and serviced amenities. We will be back again and again and will tell others about our wonderful experiences here and on the Lower Yorke Peninsula!
Caravan trip

We stayed in a luxury cabin for a romantic getaway recently. The owners were lovely. Parking was ample for car and 5.5m trailer. Ocean view was excellent. Amazing views of the full moon coming up over the ocean. The cabin met most of our expectations. Nice place to come home to after a days adventuring. Bed was comfortable and we slept well. Warm fire and cool aircon, plus nice sea breeze covered all basis in terms of temperature comfort. The jetty, boat ramp, restaurant and bottle shop are an easy 2-3 minute walk (local store is a bit further away). Would definitely recommend and we will be back in the future.

Our only suggestion for improvement is that the cabins need more ambient lighting/simple lamps, particularly in the lounge and bedrooms. The bright ceiling lighting throughout made it hard to unwind in the evenings.

Stunning location, clean facilities, large sites. We were lucky when we arrived there was no one opposite us so we didn’t have to ask anyone to move their car. We moved ours twice to help some other travellers reverse their vans in.

A cute and well maintained CP with afternoon stingray watching off the jetty and plenty of fish around. Looking forward to our next trip here!

They keep the toilets and showers constantly clean, grass is nice and maintained, have every need for fishing in the shop. Nice lively gents.
Thanks again for having us!
It was amazing I jumped fomr the top of the jeti

Nice area to stay and the nearest accommodation to jetty yes! you can even spit haha

Love fishing here we might stay again and drive around Marion and stenhouse..

⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

We cannot fault this caravan park. The camp kitchen is great, amenities are older but all very well maintained. The owners are extremely friendly and helpful! So glad we stayed here, thanks for having us guys!!
Very clean cabin, nice staff and management, quite a relaxing and peaceful place to stay, close to the jetty and the beach where you can drive your 4WD on.
I love this place its like a second home.. great owners and a well run establishment. This is a 5 star place. Best beaches and views.

Had a wonderful stay in a deluxe spa cabin.
Beautiful view and easy walk to the jetty..
If it was warmer there is a staircase down to the water for swimmers
Only problem we found with point turton location was not many food places to choose from, if tavern is closed (Tuesdays)
Stunning sunrise

Amazing little caravan park . Well maintained n beautiful hosts . We just stayed in powered site for the night but great hosts ,food trucks ,live music and you can spit on the jetty ya that close 👌. We got 2 squidly n a blue swimmer off the jetty . Don't listen to locals when they tell u its not good for crabbing or squid ,Top park n look forward to my nxt visit thanks guys n girls keep up the good work
Great park opposite jetty

A very nice spot to stay adjacent to the historic jetty where you can see stingrays. Nice walks close by. Beware however there is just the one general store in the area which is not always Di well stocked.
Great caravan park in an excellent location close to the jetty, boat ramp and all the local amenities.
Lovely clean caravan park with friendly staff. Our cabin was clean and comfortable. Spectacular views. Would definitely stay again.
Perfect spot 👍🏼
Beautiful place to stay
Great vibe and string rays are down at the jetty just near van park

What a beautiful park. Perfect location Lady on reception was so welcoming.
Great amenities including a pizza oven
Shower clean and hot.

Just spent four nights over on the Yorke Peninsula. Two nights here in the deluxe spa cabin.  Immaculate, well equipped and clean.  What a view!  Friendly on reception and when leaving - we couldn't ask for more.   Support these very nice people and the communities around them - everyone was very friendly right across the Peninsula.

We haven't been here for about 10 years and have brought our kids for the weekend. As always, a beautiful spot, great views, quiet, clean with a short walk to the jetty. Loved sharing a favourite pre kids spot with our children :)
Very comfy van park
Great place. Love it.
Just spent the best 2 days at this wonderful park. Amenities, park and staff amazing. Will come back over and over. Best swimming, fishing and walking.

Absolutely fantastic spot with gorgeous views, close to many great attractions such as beach, national park & hillock drive Excellent fishing,  sightseeing, or just relaxing. park has great size sites, & very green and maintained lawns,  owners & staff were great & very  helpful. It's great to see there is no Algea here.
The tavern on Turton, which is only a short walk away, serves great meals, and the views are beautiful. We loved the place that much
we have booked to come back in November already. Would definitely recommend it. Deb & Mark
Lovely spot near a small jetty. Walking distance from a really good pub. Camping sites are well set out. Amenities are clean but dated.
not the best sleep in Gail force winds

Unfortunately, I don't know much about Caravan Park. My trip to and from Adelaide 1 day trip. I only visited the pier and the beach.

Although they do have beautiful clear water.
Best caravan park on the Yourke Peninsula
Fantastic, uninterrupted view from our deluxe cabin. Easy walk to jetty and Tavern. Will be back again!
We stayed in a powered sight it is a great place to relax come fishing and meet new friends 🧡
Great place for weekend will be back would like to try the top of the hill parking spot.

Just there this weekend in a Deluxe Cabin which was clean, private, quiet and the bedrooms nice and dark at night for sleeping.
Cabins 1 to 10 all have direct and unobstructed views of the sea and Cabins 5 to 10 have views of the jetty too.
There is no public pedestrian access past the front of the cabins which just adds to the privacy and quietness.
Thoroughly recommend this park!

An excellent well run park with many options. New area overlooking Hardwicke Bay looks great. Plenty of squid on the jetty and clean and green caravan park. Would def go back and tell our friends. Staff were very friendly and made recommendations elsewhere

Absolutely beautiful spot with stunning views and in close proximity to many attractions including Flaherty’s Beach, Innes National Park and Hillock’s Drive. Excellent base for fishing, boating, sightseeing or just relaxing. Good sized sites, well maintained grass, hard working owners and staff and although the amenities are a little dated they were perfectly adequate. The Tavern on Turton, which serves very good meals, with lovely views is just a short 200m walk away and the jetty is right next to the park.  Just a great holiday park!

Great little park right on the jetty and boat ramp, was ment to be on an unpowered site for a couple of days b4 moving to power as easter was booked out
Got a call on way up and someone had cancelled and they managed to get us straight in to a site, dani and malcom were more then accomodating even giving us some butter and honey we forgot for the young fellas pancake's
Great size grassed sites was plenty of room for the tent boat and car
The camp kitchen was great to use had some untensils and pots if needed, was a shared fridge a pizza oven toaster and microwave, 2 bbq's that was cleaned every morning plenty of bins spots for cans n bottles
Little store in the office with some fishing gear drinks ice cream
Deff great park for the fisherman
Stayed in the luxpod it's a dark horrible accommodation the worst place I have ever see stayed

We had a powered site for two days. We appreciated the generous space between sites for the larger cars up the top of the park. Friendly staff, very clean amenities. Plenty of fishing on the beach and close to nearby locations for a drive
We enjoyed our stay but it would have been better if we had water views

This was not the best place I have stayed we had the lux apartment very dark and no window in second bedroom very depressing also they are not very giving when it comes to giving us extra toilet paper not for the price well definitely not  the most friendly place plus nothing for children to do there
Great park.  Clean, friendly and beautiful location.  The town has a great supermarket and a couple of Cafes.  We had dinner at the Marina Ale House and it was excellent.
Great little spot sorry we could only stay 1 night, good jetty great beach drive we would definitely stay again 👍

Malcom and the team at this park were so accommodating and helpful.
The views from every location are absolutely breathtaking, overlooking the jetty and rock wall.
There is a boat ramp right out the front of the caravan park and a filleting station if you are planning on boating or fishing for squid and whiting off the jetty.
There are some beautiful beaches close by and multiple tourist attractions.
Dog friendly park.
There are juvenile eagle rays and banjo sharks that come into the bay morning and night and are super friendly. The water is crystal clear and very protected in the bay with 2 pontoons for swimmers use.

I highly recommend this caravan park if you are planning a trip to the Eyre Peninsula.
Very friendly and helpful
Cabins are really lovely, staff are helpful and friendly, it's a busy place, meet new people.
Very friendly staff. The powered site was great and we enjoyed our time there. Beach was amazing and jetty was used extensively!
Absolutely gorgeous! Great cabins that were very clean. Highly recommend

Fantastic little caravan park to stay at.
Staff are absolutely fantastic. I asked a small question about the beaches and ended up with a drawn up map and itinerary with the best spots to check out and what to do for the next few days. We turned up unannounced and they just happen to have a spot free during a busy time and were super helpful and polite about everything.
Doing a few days around the Yorke on a trip and a great base to park the van. Clean amenities, tidy sites and friendly locals.

Great little stop for a few days exploring.
Very nice park recommended.
Great park.. clean tidy and friendly staff
We have a caravan but a beautiful place to visit and stay , great staff very clean park

Thank you Dani & Malcolm. We love staying at the Pt Turton Caravan Park. Kind and friendly service, immaculate amenities, powered sites are beautifully maintained and our kids love the fishing, jetty jumping and exploring the area. We'll keep coming back.
We got perfect weather for a few days here. The jetty and the stingrays are amazing and right there for you to experience.
Epic location and staff are awesome! Highly recommend

Wir haben hier spontan 2 Nächte über meinen Geburtstag gebucht und eine wundervolle Site neben der Rezeption mit Meerblick erhalten!! Das Personal ist mehr als freundlich und alles ist sehr sauber und gepflegt. Die Dusche ist sehr schön mit viel Platz für die eigenen Sachen und der Wasserdruck ist klasse!! Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr genossen und empfehlen diesen Caravan Park von Herzen weiter !!

I've spent 3 nights at the caravan park. The owners never stopped getting things fixed or cleaned, and the lawn watered, too. Facilities are clean, tidy, and looked after very well. It sits in a nice spot, near the jetty and the tavern. Also, the view to the ocean is very nice, especially when the sun is rising. Highly recommended for those who want a  quick gateway from everyday life, Yorke peninsula is a must visit place, and Point Turton is right in the centre of it.
A beautiful part of South Australia
Great location overlooking the bay!  New Amenities are underway on the top level short walk to boat ramp and jetty.  Small shop well stocked.  Lovely management.

Booked 3 nights, stayed an extra night… wish we could have stayed more. A lovely little caravan park. With 3 young kids, we thought the lack of playgrounds and pools would have been a challenge. Couldn’t have been more wrong - the kids (and adults!) absolutely adored this place. With the jetty nearby (great squid fishing!) manta rays, local beaches such as flaherty’s and the Pub just 200m walk away - Point Turton was a treat to stay.

Caravan park was immaculately presented.  Great camp kitchen, toilet blocks and showers were spotless. The service was polite and helpful with a well stocked office.

Will definitely be coming back.
What a wonderful location, we will be back.

Nice park well cared for.
Management are on the go all day.
Facilities are  dated  but  clean.
Had a great few days . ☺️

Booked 1 night ,stayed 2.great amenities, camp kitchen. Communal fire approx 4.30 to 5.00pm.pet friendly, ice creams and cold drinks and fishing gear available at office. Fishing off the nearby jetty is popular.
Wow what a fantastic location , park is beautiful, amenities are great , short little walk to the pub and also short skip and a jump to the jetty   Totally recommend if you are travelling through

If only the ammenities were updated there would be nothing to mention. Don’t get me wrong they are clean and maintained to a point but a park this good should step it up a notch and set the standard. Enjoyed our stay here and would definitely come again.  Huge grasses sites with excellent phone and internet reception.
Great park. Great location, it's good to be able to walk over the road to fish. Friendly staff. And a very good kitchen with a full stove.
Great park, good size caravan sites, staff are very friendly, clean amenities, we would recommend this caravan Park to everyone.
Caught squid off jetty. Lovely sheltered caravan site. Ate good meals at pub near by. And superb beaches nearby! Toilets and kitchen spotless. A fire was lit every night....
Loved the location stayed in cabin right by the sea, friendly staff  jetty& pub walking distance
A place for De-stressing selves... 💕
Second time we have stayed here. Park & amenities are kept well maintained. Friendly staff & atmosphere. Will be back again someday.
Very good caravan park, clean amenities and camp kitchen
Location location location. Great holiday spot, perfect base for exploring the area and finding great fishing places. Local tavern is an easy walk away and worth a visit for good meals etc.
It's one of our favourite spots to visit. Fantastic views.
Nice park adjacent to the jetty. Fish from the jetty or watch the rays swim around.
Great spot, close to tavern, great management, they care.
Nice park and waterfront sites are so much better than up the back.. staff helpful and everything is clean and tidy. 100% recommend.

Right on the shore front. Sites at the front had mesh mats. Amenities were clean and tidy. Each evening..if weather is ok, they light a camp fire for you to enjoy. The jetty just across the road for those who like fishing.

Great little park.
We had a powered site with an awesome view over the jetty.
Watched the sunrise both mornings
I only used the old amenities, which were fine, my wife said the new ones are good.
Nice little park overlooking  the water. Clean amenities. The town has very little services though. A pub and a tiny general store.

No flexibility!!||||We are a couple doing the Walk the Yorke and wanted to stay in a cabin one night after walking from corny point then leave early the  next morning. This was not possible as they have a two night minimum even in the quiet season. No help for walkers on the peninsula….||Unfortunately this is what gives YP a bad reputation. We’ll bush camp and cook our own food!!

Loved it here.
Right next to the jetty and beach.
100% beautiful spot
We didn't stay but had a quick look and it looked a great place to go with the caravan. Fantastic views over a bay and marina.

Stopped by the jetty for a quick fish 🐟
Lovely jetty with the local wildlife paying visits to give their support.
Excellent amenities, very reasonable price.
Excellent as always , great easter hunt they put on for the kids, already booked for next year
Best campground up here, absolutely love this place. Campers are very friendly and respectful too.
Stayed in deluxe cabins. A magnificent setting on the cliffs overlooking the jetty.

Great caravan park in perfect position. On the water with fantastic views. Jetty out the front and stingrays under the jetty. Caravan park staff friendly and helpful. Park well maintained. Only comment was availability of toilets when in the upper area. Small public toilet reasonably close but a good walk to main amenities.
Excellent staff great location
窗外 大海風平浪靜 微風徐來 狠4舒爽。

Thank you to the friendly people running this very busy park, who found us a spot to park our camper so we could stay the night and celebrate with our friends, we really appreciated it.  Congratulations on a lovely, neat and tidy, well run park .  We will certainly recommend you.
Regards,
Charmaine

Very friendly & helpful managers. Sites are grassed with nice rubberised pads. Grass is watered in between each booking. Amenities old but very clean, a great camp kitchen and again very clean. The only downside is how tight the sites are, very hard to get into some. Think twice if you have a big rig. Great jetty across the road and lovely to watch the Eagle Rays swimming around
Just a visit will definately book in
Great view, plenty of beaches to visit, lots to see not too far away. Can be windy at times se.

A great caravan park at the foreshore of Yorke Peninsula. Welcoming with friendly staff during check-in. Good spacious campsite for larger van. Watet front sites are spectacular overlook at jetty & beach view. Amenities in the central of campsite, very clean open or can be enclosed camp kitchen. BBQ hotplates at open space with tables & benches.

Can't comment on the park itself, but we were in town for the fireworks on NYE and it was packed with happy campers, so the staff and management must be doing something right!

Location is top notch with some spectacular coastline on your doorstep to explore.

Highly recommend!

What a cracker of a location, council owned, friendly staff. Right on the beach front. Variety of site sizes, powered unpowered and cabins. Pub 3 minute walk what else do you need. You can also see string rays at the jetty 1 min walk almost every day with resident local Barbara (nice pun) showing up multiple times a day. Excellent family holiday location. Bookings essential.

Camp, caravan, cabin or pod you won't be disappointed. A great place for a quick get away or long stay. There is so much to see at Yorkes or just enjoy the surroundings without going anywhere.
Yoy may even get all 4 seasons in just a few days.
Highly recommend 5 stars 🌟  from our family.
Comfy clean cabin with beautiful views ... even when it's pouring with rain!
Great cabins awesome views
3 night stay on powered site. Clean amenities, great view of ocean.
Beautiful spot and very relaxing. Nice green sites. Will certainly be back...
Great place to stay on the waterfront.

Amazing view !!!!
It was really peaceful and calm.
Very peaceful park. Right by the jetty and easy walking distance of tavern. I’ll be back
Great spot, nice sheltered location
Used as base to look at the bottom of the Yorke, clean amenities and host are great.
Great park all round!! Definitely be going back!!
Very well looked after and close to the beach
Only visited the jetty for a quick stopover.
Delightful

Stayed in the luxpod. Basic but all you need. Really nicely set up for elderly or disabled folk.
The park is good but not many activities for kids. Kids have to entertain themselves with the beach or fishing and that can be hard if the weather isn't conducive.
Great fishing and kayaking when the weather is nice. Great pub up the road for good food and drinks and a game of pool or two. I will definitely be back again.
What an amazing place. Can’t get much closer to the water with a van. Hosts are wonderful people and very helpful and accomodating with all questions. 11 out of 10.
Best position on the Yorke peninsula.
Quiet location. Ideal location to jetty and boat ramp
Only a small beach area which is quite rocky. Close to the Jetty and boat launching. Great for fishing.
Went to cook on the BBQ but only to find out they weren't working try another one same thing, Only one was working out 3 but that was being use so ended up cooking in our cabin,

We parked up here for 8 nights and had the absolute best time! The location is stunning with dolphins keen to follow your boat right at the boat ramp. The amenities are immaculate, after staying at many parks, these are hotel grade clean. The camp kitchen was a lifesaver when we ran out of gas, massive clean kitchen, toaster/microwave/fridge all clean & good to use. The sites, beautifully maintained. The laundry room was great. Washing machine & dryer to use with just a few gold coins.
We also found the people there to be so kind, not only the staff/owners (who were too kind) but the people staying, we made so many friends during our stay who gave us plenty of advice, places to see even some yummy recipes! Can’t rave more about this place, my partner, Pup & I can’t wait to come back!
